title: Certified affine extraction from CNF in Lean 4
description:
A Lean 4 artifact for certified affine-structure extraction and GF(2) semantic preservation for scoped Tseitin-style CNF families, with a machine-checked, axiom-audited theorem surface.

v0.3.2 adds the mixed ordinary + same-support quotient key-disjoint component-list theorem (nonexhaustiveSemanticExtractorCompleteOn_of_mixedQuotientKeyDisjointComponentList) and a concrete nonempty 3-component witness (nonexhaustiveSemanticExtractorCompleteOn_threeMixedOrdinarySameSupportQuotientWitness: one ordinary generated component + two generated same-support fallback components) under explicit canonical-key-disjointness. The audit surface is lean/CertifiedAffine/Audit.lean.

Non-claims (binding): this artifact does not claim or imply P = NP, P != NP, a general SAT algorithm, a general CNF-to-XOR recognizer, any NP/circuit lower bound, or any result beyond the explicitly-scoped, Lean-checked theorems for the named Tseitin-style families. Use the concept DOI; no version DOI is minted in this metadata update.
